What are the health problems associated with excessive salt/sodium intake? 62 /c216Restrict the intake of added salt right from an early age. /c216Develop a taste for foods/diets that are low in salt. /c216Restrict intake of preserved and processed foods such as papads, pickles, sauces, ketch up, salted biscuits, chips, cheese and salted fish. /c216Eat plenty of vegetables and fruits. They are good source of potassium. /c216Use always iron fortified iodized salt (double fortified salt) . POINTS TO PONDER 63 Guideline 11 What makes food unsafe? How do we select safe food?
